results.title: Schweppes Durban Gin Festival 2026 returns with craft gin tastings, Kyle Deutsch and Sketchy Bongo
results.description: The Schweppes Durban Gin Festival 2026 returns to Beachwood Country Club on June 27, bringing together leading South African craft gin producers, food vendors and live performances by Kyle Deutsch and Sketchy Bongo.

results.title: 30 novels, mysteries, romance and nonfiction books for your June TBR list
results.description: Summer offers a range of reading opportunities, whether you’re lounging outside by a body of water or inside near a glass of water.
